outcome_first.name: outcome_first
outcome_first.instruction: State the desired end state first, then justify each step by how it moves toward that outcome.

constraint_first.name: constraint_first
constraint_first.instruction: List constraints and limits first, then build reasoning that respects them.

decompose_then_verify.name: decompose_then_verify
decompose_then_verify.instruction: Break the goal into smaller parts, solve each part, then verify the whole chain.

backward_from_goal.name: backward_from_goal
backward_from_goal.instruction: Start from the final goal and reason backward to determine necessary prior steps.
